review.setting: Having some bourbon after a day of work
review.nose: Nutty as all hell, toffee, caramel, cinnamon, burnt sugar, sweet oak, old rickhouse, black pepper, clove, confectioner sugar, grape, plum, almost smells finished.
review.palate: Black peppercorns, cinnamon, caramel, salty tortilla chips, fudge, pecans, confectioners sugar, light clove.
review.finish: Strong, sweet oak, black peppercorn, big caramel notes round the palate. Mint, chocolate, there's a really light fruit note that I can't quite place, but it's well balanced with the darker flavors of the finish.
review.thoughts: Really good stuff. Dark flavors dominate with the caramel, dark chocolate, and peppercorns. There's small waves of a light fruit note I still can't quite place, maybe green grapes? It's really well balanced with the caramel, oak, and chocolate, plus the baking spices and mint make the finish last for a long, long time.
